serverInfo.name: OSHA Compliance MCP
serverInfo.description: Query 479 OSHA safety standards (29 CFR 1910 & 1926) with AI-generated plain-English summaries. Covers fall protection, PPE requirements, penalty amounts, and more.

tools.name: lookup_standard
tools.description: Search OSHA safety standards by topic, keyword, hazard, or standard number (e.g., 'fall protection', '1926.501', 'confined space', 'respirator'). Returns plain-English summaries with official citations.

query.description: Search term: topic, keyword, hazard, or standard number

tools.name: get_ppe_requirements
tools.description: Get required Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) for a specific work task or hazard, with OSHA standard citations.

tools.name: get_penalty_info
tools.description: Get current OSHA penalty amounts by violation type (serious, willful, repeat, other-than-serious, failure-to-abate, posting requirements).

violation_type.description: Type of violation, or 'all' for complete schedule

tools.name: check_applicability
tools.description: Determine which OSHA standards apply to a specific industry, task, or work scenario.

tools.name: get_standard_text
tools.description: Get the full regulatory text of a specific OSHA standard by its number (e.g., '1910.134', '1926.501').
